caption: A man with dark hair, wearing a white shirt and a dark blazer, is presenting on a stage in front of large digital screens. In the initial sequence, he stands to the left of a slide titled "BUT FOR US?" which lists several bullet points: "Got an overview in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML, etc)", "Difference between ML & Data Pipelines", and "Overview of Airflow + Usecase", followed by the phrase "THE BIG PICTURE". The bottom of the screen features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". As the presentation progresses, the man shifts his position, moving to the right side of the screen while the same "BUT FOR US?" slide remains visible. Finally, the slide changes to a new one displaying the headings "CODE" and "SLIDES" with accompanying GitHub URLs: "https://github.com/axsauze/crypto-ml-" and "http://github.com/axsauze/industrial-airflow".
